title: Made todoist-gtd CLI more robust for daily use

brief.why: Production since Jan 2026 but field reports surface rough edges
brief.what: Section validation, PATH handling, Sublime Loop docs, timeout verification
brief.done: Weekly review workflow runs without workarounds

title: Fix section/project validation to fail gracefully

brief.why: Field report: --section flag throws 400 when section doesn't exist
brief.what: Check section/project exists before API call, show available options on error
brief.done: todoist add --section Nonexistent shows helpful error with available sections

brief.why: Timeout wrapper added but never tested - SDK may bypass it
brief.what: Set very short timeout, verify slow operations fail
brief.done: Test case proves timeout is enforced

brief.why: Pattern emerged but not documented - field report recommends it
brief.what: Add to PATTERNS.md: temp file → Sublime edit → Todoist
brief.done: PATTERNS.md has Bulk Action Intake section

title: Use absolute paths in skill examples

brief.done: All SKILL.md examples use absolute path
